name: BarChart

values.name: barChart
values.comment: Creates a bar chart with multiple bars per x-value

values.name: singleBarChart
values.type: ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> BarChart.XValueMapper a -> BarChart.YValueMapper a -> DataFrame.DataFrame a -> TypedSvg.Core.Svg msg

name: DataFrame

aliases.name: DataFrame
aliases.comment: The DataFrame type containing the schema of the data and the data itself
aliases.type: { schema : Maybe.Maybe DataFrame.Schema, data : List.List a }

values.name: create
values.comment: Creates a DataFrame from the supplied data

values.name: filter
values.comment: Filter rows by the specified filter function

values.name: length
values.comment: Gives back the number of rows in the DataFrame

values.name: map
values.comment: Maps a function over each row of a DataFrame

name: LineChart

unions.name: XValueMapper
unions.comment: Maps a row either to a time or to a value

values.name: lineChart
values.comment: Creates a line chart with multiple lines
values.type: ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> LineChart.XValueMapper a -> List.List (LineChart.YValueMapper a) -> DataFrame.DataFrame a -> TypedSvg.Core.Svg msg

values.name: singleLineChart
values.comment: Creates a line chart with a single line
values.type: ( Basics.Float, Basics.Float ) -> LineChart.XValueMapper a -> LineChart.YValueMapper a -> DataFrame.DataFrame a -> TypedSvg.Core.Svg msg
